name: Sponge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour four times.
2. Beat the egg yolks until light and thick.
3. Gradually add half of the sugar, lemon zest, and vanilla to the yolks, beating well.
4. In a separate bowl, beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
5. Gently fold the cream of tartar and remaining sugar into the egg white mixture.
6. Combine the yolk mixture with the salt and flour, folding lightly.
7. Pour the batter into an ungreased pan with a center tube.
8. Bake at 325°F (163°C) for 1 hour.
